title: Section — Schedule & Milestones
description: Contract milestones, key dates, and duration constraints harvested from the documents — the dated skeleton a scheduling tool builds a CPM schedule on. Captures owner-imposed milestones, phase durations, and liquidated-damages-bearing dates. The model structures the dates; it does not build a logic-driven schedule.

label.description: e.g. 'Notice to Proceed', 'Substantial Completion', 'Final Completion', 'Phase 1 Complete'.

date.description: ISO 8601 when an absolute date is stated.

relative_to.description: e.g. '180 calendar days from NTP' when the milestone is relative.

constraints.description: Sequencing/timing constraints stated in the documents, verbatim.
